title: Fix the Unused Variable Warning
description: A debugging variable was left behind after removing its print statement, causing F841.
pr_diff:
PR Diff:
  - debug_info = f"Processing {len(items)} items"
  - print(debug_info)
  + # removed debug logging
  + debug_info = f"Processing {len(items)} items"
initial_ci_output:
ruff check src/config.py

FAILED

FAILED
